# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

const DEFAULT_CONFIG = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI: false,
  FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: true,
  FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES: false,
  MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE: 100,
  CACHE_TTL_SECONDS: 300,
};

type Config = typeof DEFAULT_CONFIG;

async function getConfig(): Promise<Config> {
  if (!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }

  try {
    const apiKey = await get<string>('API_KEY');
    const dbUrl = await get<string>('DB_URL');
    const featureFlagNewUI = await get<boolean>('FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI');
    const featureFlagAnalytics = await get<boolean>('FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS');
    const featureFlagBetaFeatures = await get<boolean>('FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES');
    const maxRequestsPerMinute = await get<number>('MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE');
    const cacheTtlSeconds = await get<number>('CACHE_TTL_SECONDS');

    return {
      API_KEY: apiKey ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY,
      DB_URL: dbUrl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
      FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI: featureFlagNewUI ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI,
      FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: featureFlagAnalytics ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS,
      FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES: featureFlagBetaFeatures ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES,
      MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE: maxRequestsPerMinute ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE,
      CACHE_TTL_SECONDS: cacheTtlSeconds ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.CACHE_TTL_SECONDS,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error reading from Edge Config:', error);
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }
}

export default async function handler(req: NextRequest) {
  const config = await getConfig();

  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const action = url.searchParams.get('action');

  if (action === 'get-config') {
    return NextResponse.json({
      config: {
        API_KEY: config.API_KEY.substring(0, 10) + '...',
        DB_URL: config.DB_URL.split('@')[1] || 'hidden',
        FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI: config.FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI,
        FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: config.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS,
        FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES: config.FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES,
        MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE: config.MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE,
        CACHE_TTL_SECONDS: config.CACHE_TTL_SECONDS,
      },
      source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge-config' : 'defaults',
    });
  }

  if (action === 'api-request') {
    const authHeader = req.headers.get('authorization');
    const providedKey = authHeader?.replace('Bearer ', '');

    if (providedKey !== config.API_KEY) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Invalid API key' },
        { status: 401 }
      );
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      message: 'API request successful',
      dbConnected: config.DB_URL ? true : false,
      features: {
        newUI: config.FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI,
        analytics: config.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS,
        beta: config.FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES,
      },
    });
  }

  if (action === 'check-feature') {
    const feature = url.searchParams.get('feature');
    let enabled = false;

    switch (feature) {
      case 'new-ui':
        enabled = config.FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI;
        break;
      case 'analytics':
        enabled = config.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS;
        break;
      case 'beta':
        enabled = config.FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES;
        break;
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      feature,
      enabled,
    });
  }

  if (action === 'db-info') {
    const dbHost = config.DB_URL.split('@')[1]?.split('/')[0] || 'unknown';
    
    return NextResponse.json({
      host: dbHost,
      configured: !!config.DB_URL,
      maxRequests: config.MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE,
      cacheTtl: config.CACHE_TTL_SECONDS,
    });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({
    message: 'Edge Function with Edge Config',
    availableActions: ['get-config', 'api-request', 'check-feature', 'db-info'],
    usage: {
      'get-config': '?action=get-config',
      'api-request': '?action=api-request (with Authorization header)',
      'check-feature': '?action=check-feature&feature=new-ui',
      'db-info': '?action=db-info',
    },
  });
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};
